query:
SELECT 'contacts' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM contacts
UNION ALL SELECT 'transactions', COUNT(*) FROM transactions
UNION ALL SELECT 'agent_connections', COUNT(*) FROM agent_connections
UNION ALL SELECT 'communications', COUNT(*) FROM communications
UNION ALL SELECT 'activity_log', COUNT(*) FROM activity_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'market_match_sessions', COUNT(*) FROM market_match_sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'connection_requests', COUNT(*) FROM connection_requests
UNION ALL SELECT 'transaction_payout_items', COUNT(*) FROM transaction_payout_items;
